task_completion.description: Verify that the three required calculated columns were created in Oracle Analytics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the data elements panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics interface. You should see 'Profit_Per_Unit', 'Profit_Tier', and 'Total_Cost_Ratio' listed, typically under a 'My Calculations' folder or within the dataset columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Unit Profitability' canvas has a 100% Stacked Bar chart of Profit_Tier by Product Category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 100% Stacked Bar chart titled 'Order Profitability Distribution by Category'. The chart should show Product Category and Profit_Tier. Check that the proportions roughly match the expected values (e.g., Furniture is ~51% Loss Making, Technology is ~33% High Margin).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Cost Structure' canvas has a Combo chart of Total_Cost_Ratio and Profit by Sub-Category, sorted descending.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Combo chart titled 'Cost Burden vs Profitability by Sub-Category'. It must have Product Sub Category on the x-axis, bars for average Total_Cost_Ratio, and a line for average Profit on a secondary y-axis. The bars must be sorted in descending order, with 'Appliances' and 'Paper' as the highest bars.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Segment Efficiency' canvas has a Pivot Table of avg Profit_Per_Unit by Segment and Ship Mode with conditional formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Pivot Table titled 'Unit Profit by Segment and Shipping Mode'. Rows are Customer Segment, columns are Ship Mode. The cells must show average Profit_Per_Unit and have conditional formatting applied: negative values (like Consumer x Delivery Truck) must be colored red, and positive values colored green.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'unit_economics.dva' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics window title shows 'unit_economics', and there is evidence (like a Save As dialog, export dialog, or File Explorer window) showing the file 'unit_economics.dva' saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics GUI to build the workbook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being actively used (e.g., dragging and dropping columns, writing formulas in the calculation editor).

integrity.description: Verify the charts are genuinely rendered by Oracle Analytics.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualizations should appear within the Oracle Analytics canvas area with standard UI elements like axes, legends, and tooltips, not pasted from an external source.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by running a script to generate the .dva file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or command prompt should not show scripts or commands being executed to create or modify the .dva file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Canvas 1 Expected: Furniture has 21% High/28% Low/51% Loss; Office Supplies has 12% High/39% Low/49% Loss; Technology has 33% High/27% Low/40% Loss.
Canvas 2 Expected: Top sub-categories by Total_Cost_Ratio are Appliances (17.5%), Paper (14.0%), Storage & Organization (13.4%), Office Furnishings (13.2%), Tables (12.9%).
Canvas 3 Expected: Red (negative) cells are Consumer x Delivery Truck (-28.57), Consumer x Regular Air (-3.59), Home Office x Delivery Truck (-24.46), Small Business x Delivery Truck (-31.38). All other cells are positive (GREEN).
